CREATE TABLE test_hash (key Tuple(UInt64, UInt64), value String) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt64, data String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT j.id, hex(sipHash128Keyed(hash.key, j.data)) FROM test_hash AS hash JOIN test_join AS j ON j.id = 1;
SELECT hex(sipHash128Keyed((k0, k1), value)) FROM (SELECT (506097522914230528, 1084818905618843912) AS key, 'foo' AS value) AS subquery;
SELECT hex(sipHash128Keyed((506097522914230528, 1084818905618843912), value || randUnsigned() % 100)) FROM test_hash WHERE value LIKE 'f%' ORDER BY value;
WITH key AS (SELECT (506097522914230528, 1084818905618843912) AS k) SELECT hex(sipHash128Keyed(k, 'foo')) FROM key;
SELECT hex(sipHash128Keyed((k0, k1), 'bar')) FROM (SELECT (0, 0) AS k0, (1, 2) AS k1) AS keys;
